--- Round 1 ---
<think>The user is asking me to classify judgment documents into 6 categories of case types (案由). I need to read DOC7 and determine which category it belongs to.

Let me analyze the anchor summary for DOC7_A1:
- It mentions "再审申请人王某某因诉被申请人宣城市宣州区济川街道办事处强制拆除房屋一案" - This is about "forced demolition of housing" (强制拆除房屋)
- The defendant is "宣城市宣州区济川街道办事处" (a street office/government body)
- This appears to be an administrative case (行政判决)

The 6 categories are:
1. 行政主体-房屋拆迁管理（拆迁） - Administrative subject - Housing demolition management (demolition)
2. 刑事赔偿 - Criminal compensation
3. 不动产登记纠纷 - Real estate registration disputes
4. 知识产权与竞争 - Intellectual property and competition
5. 产品责任纠纷 - Product liability disputes
6. 行政行为-行政给付 - Administrative act - Administrative payment/benefit

Based on the anchor summary, this case is about "强制拆除房屋" (forced demolition of housing), which clearly falls under "行政主体-房屋拆迁管理（拆迁）" category.

I should open this anchor to get the full text and confirm the case type, then extract the title of the document.

Let me open DOC7_A1 to get more details.</think>
<search>{"action":"open","anchor_id":"DOC7_A1","expected_evidence":"案件类型、案由信息、判决文书标题"}</search>
<info anchor_id="DOC7_A1">
再审申请人（一审原告、二审上诉人）王某某，女，1962年1月25日出生，汉族，住安徽省宣城市宣州区。
被申请人（一审被告、二审被上诉人）宣城市宣州区济川街道办事处，住所地安徽省宣城市宣州区宛溪南路93号。
法定代表人翟某某，该办事处主任。
再审申请人王某某因诉被申请人宣城市宣州区济川街道办事处强制拆除房屋一案，不服安徽省宣城市中级人民法院（2021）皖18行终171号行政判决，向本院申请再审。

本案审查再审申请期间，王某某与宣城市宣州区济川街道办事处达成和解，2024年1月4日王某某向本院提出撤回再审申请。

本院认为：王某某提出撤回再审申请的请求，不违反法律规定，本院予以准许。依照《最高人民法院关于适用<中华人民共和国行政诉讼法>的解释》第一百一十五条第二款的规定，裁定如下：
准许王某某撤回再审申请。
</info>

This clearly falls under the category "行政主体-房屋拆迁管理（拆迁）" (Administrative subject - Housing demolition management).

The document title is 《判决文书7》 as given in the task description.

I have enough information to classify this document. Let me stop and provide the answer.</think>
<search>{"action":"stop","reason":"collected all needed evidence for DOC7 classification"}</search>
